title: GPT explained visually..
summary: A visual tutorial breaking down how Generative Pretrained Transformers work, covering self-attention, multi-head attention, feed forward networks, positional embeddings, and residual connections. The content explains the basic mechanics underlying leading models like Gemini, Opus, and Qwen.
writeup: This video is a visual walkthrough of how Generative Pretrained Transformers operate, covering self-attention, multi-head attention, feed forward networks, positional embeddings, and residual connections. It frames these mechanics as the shared architecture behind leading models including Gemini, Opus, and Qwen. The explanation also touches on sparse attention, Softmax, and layer normalization as components of the model.
